notes: Core variance. The charted 20 worlds' names, history and identity never change - but their yields now do. Every Sector Code jitters each world's deposits, industry, tech and law level a little (resource types stay put; only quantities shift), so Ferros Prime's ore or Terra Nova's law level isn't always exactly what it was last game. Same Sector Code as always reproduces the whole galaxy - frontier ring, lane graph, and this too.
